key.name: disabled-features
key.summary: gnome-shell subsystems gnoblin has turned off
key.description: Ids of gnome-shell subsystems (e.g. "osd", "screenshot") that gnoblin gates OFF at runtime so an external userspace can own them. A subsystem is enabled unless its id appears here. Driven live over org.gnoblin.Shell (ListFeatures/GetFeature/SetFeature); see js/ui/components/gnoblinControl.js.
